checks.name: ANALYZE_MODE
checks.evidence: render.yaml: hardcoded ANALYZE_MODE=1 on both genesis-system3-backend and genesis-system3-worker service definitions (not sync:false — cannot be silently changed via dashboard without editing render.yaml)

checks.name: LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED
checks.evidence: render.yaml: hardcoded LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=0 on both services. Also confirmed live via GET /api/health at 2026-07-01T18:35Z: live_allowed=false.

checks.name: SYSTEM3_LIVE_TRADING_ALLOWED
checks.evidence: render.yaml: hardcoded SYSTEM3_LIVE_TRADING_ALLOWED=0 on both services.

checks.name: SYSTEM3_REAL_ONLY
checks.evidence: NOT explicitly set as an env var in render.yaml. dashboard/backend/app.py:369 — REAL_ONLY = os.environ.get('SYSTEM3_REAL_ONLY', '1')... defaults to '1' (True) when unset, which is the required safe value. Actual runtime behavior is correct, but this is a default fallback, not an explicit hardcoded config value like the other three. Recommend adding it explicitly to render.yaml for the same tamper-resistance as the other three flags.
checks.honest_caveat: Not literally 'set' on Render — verified via source code default, not via an explicit env var read.

checks.name: real_order_placement_blocked
checks.evidence: core/brokers/dhan/dhan_readonly.py: the place_order, modify_order, cancel_order, place_super_order, modify_super_order, and cancel_super_order methods all unconditionally raise RuntimeError(_LIVE_TRADING_BLOCKED_MSG) when called — not gated on any env var, hardcoded block regardless of flag state.
checks.additional_evidence: dashboard/backend/order_management.py OrderManagement.create_order (used by POST /api/orders/create) is paper-only by design per its own docstring: writes an order record to a local JSON-lines file only, never calls any broker API. No code path from /api/orders/create reaches the blocked dhan_readonly order methods or any real broker order endpoint.

checks.name: dashboard_shows_paper_live_disabled_banner
checks.evidence: Live screenshot of /ui (2026-07-02 00:05 IST, after PR #54 frontend fix deployed) shows: 'PAPER TRADING MODE (NO REAL ORDERS)' banner text, top-bar badges 'PAPER' and 'LIVE OFF', 'MARKET CLOSED' badge. Screenshot provided by user during this session.

checks.name: no_code_path_places_real_orders_when_live_flags_off
checks.evidence: Combination of the two findings above: the only order-creation endpoint (/api/orders/create -> OrderManagement.create_order) never calls a broker API at all (paper-only), and the underlying Dhan SDK wrapper independently hard-blocks all order/modify/cancel methods unconditionally. Two independent layers, neither gated on a flag that could be flipped to accidentally enable real orders — the block in dhan_readonly.py has no flag check at all, it always raises.

notes: SYSTEM3_REAL_ONLY relies on a code default rather than an explicit render.yaml value. Recommend adding it explicitly for consistency with the other three hardcoded safety flags — filed as a minor follow-up, not a blocker (current behavior is already safe).
